name: pascal-lsp-client
description: VS Code Client for custom Pascal LSP Server

pascalLsp.serverPath.description: Path to the LspServer executable. If empty, the extension looks for build/LspServer.exe in the workspace root.

pascalLsp.configuredPaths.description: List of custom search paths for Pascal units (absolute or relative to workspace).

pascalLsp.readLpi.description: Use search paths from Lazarus (.lpi) project files if available.

pascalLsp.readDproj.description: Use search paths from Delphi (.dproj) project files if available.

pascalLsp.scanProjectFolders.description: Scan workspace subfolders recursively (up to depth of 3, ignoring build/system folders) to discover unit directories.
